description:
GIVEN the user is watching VOD/SVOD content
AND TTS is enabled
AND the video is paused

steps.action: WHEN the user plays the video
steps.result:
THEN the user will hear: “Play, <current_time> of <total_time>, press select to pause.”

For example: "Play, 1 minute 30 seconds of 5 minutes 45 seconds, press select to pause"
